channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: '250% faster than a normal mouse': This rotary mouse promises to be a real game-changer for productivity, scrolling, and racing sim fans
item.description: The Rotary Mouse replaces scroll wheels with a rotary dial, promising faster navigation, smoother control, and experimental gaming applications.

item.title: Anthropic’s long-sidelined Fable 5 is greenlit to return
item.description: After weeks of negotiating with the Trump administration, Anthropic is finally going to be able to bring Claude Fable 5 back online. In a post on X, Anthropic said it plans to begin restoring access tomorrow. Anthropic: We've received notice that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos […]

item.title: Samsung teases its next big Unpacked event with social media posts that reveal almost nothing — but we've spotted some hints
item.description: Samsung is teasing its next generation of foldables with a cryptic social media campaign, and we're just trying to read the tea leaves.

item.title: Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide : Samsung confirme qu’il vous réserve une surprise carrée
item.description: Samsung publie une série de vidéos laissant très clairement entendre qu'un tout nouveau format de smartphone pliable va voir le jour. On attend le Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide.

item.title: ‘Speed without control is a liability, not an advantage': GitLab study reveals AI code generation is outpacing controls
item.description: Rapid AI adoption is just shifting bottlenecks downstream as governance fails to keep up, making trust more critical than speed.

item.title: The Trump Administration Is Lifting Its Export Controls on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable AI Models
item.description: The White House is easing restrictions on Anthropic’s most advanced AI models weeks after ordering the company to suspend access for foreign nationals.

item.title: The best TVs of 2026 so far: RGB TVs were the talk of CES, but theyre not the only exciting releases
item.description: Who has the best RGB TV, best OLED TV, or best art TV? I'm comparing releases from Samsung, LG, TCL, and more halfway through the year.

item.title: Startup Battlefield Australia application closes in days: Apply before July 6
item.description: What if one pitch changed everything? The next company nobody has heard of yet is building something that will matter. It could be yours.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Wednesday, July 1 (game #1619)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Wednesday, July 1 (game #1116)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Wednesday, July 1 (game #850)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Enola Holmes 3 review: Sherlocks sister takes over the game
item.description: 'Enola Holmes 3' review: Millie Bobby Brown plays Sherlock's sister, and this time she's looking for her famous detective brother.

item.title: Discord now runs natively on Meta Quest headsets
item.description: The app's arrival follows an announcement at last year's Meta Connect conference.

item.title: Dish files for bankruptcy, but not shutting down
item.description: Dish, the company that operates Dish TV and Sling TV, has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy," as reported earlier by Reuters. The plan will allow the EchoStar-owned company to continue to wind down its wireless operations after "unforeseen delays" held back its sale of $23 billion worth of 5G spectrum to AT&T. Dish TV, Sling […]

item.title: This portable monitor makes its stand useful by shoving 7 ports (and a microSD card) in it to boost your productivity away from a laptop
item.description: InnLead Monhub combines a 15.6-inch display, multi-device connectivity, and a travel-focused design with uncertainty

item.title: Morgan Stanley cut its riskiest reconciliation job in half — by making its agents less autonomous
item.description: Most enterprise AI deployments so far have focused on coding assistants and customer service bots. Morgan Stanley has deployed agents in one of banking's most accuracy-critical, deadline-driven workflows instead — profit and loss (P&L) reconciliation — and cut the work in half. The counterintuitive part: it got there by making the system less autonomous, not more.Humans stay tightly in the loop, and their decisions are iteratively turned into repeatable rules the system can apply on its own.“It's much more like a co-worker than a copilot,” Morgan Stanley Managing Director Todd Johnson said at ...

item.title: WD Red Plus 4TB review: The WD40EFPX is a reliable NAS hard drive small business users might buy on price alone
item.description: The WD Red Plus WD40EFPX is a suitable drive for small NAS installations that uses CMR technology.

item.title: Amazon will pay $2.25 million to settle FTC identity theft case
item.description: The retailer allegedly failed to meet requirements under the Fair Credit Reporting Act.
